findings.location: sections.s1 (code block, グループIDのチェック and 認可単位IDのチェック comments)
findings.description: The knowledge file modifies existing source code comments by appending labels not present in the source. Source has `// グループIDのチェック` and `// 認可単位IDのチェック`, but the knowledge file renders them as `// グループIDのチェック（null guardなし）` and `// 認可単位IDのチェック（null guardあり）`. These parenthetical labels do not exist in the source.
findings.source_evidence: Source code shows: `// グループIDのチェック` and `// 認可単位IDのチェック` — no null guard annotations are present in the original comments.

findings.description: The source contains a `.. note::` stating `doRW11AC0201メソッドは、ユーザ情報登録画面を表示する処理。` This explains why `@OnError` redirects to `doRW11AC0201` (it displays the user registration screen), providing context for understanding the error handling configuration. This note is absent from the knowledge file.
findings.source_evidence: Source note: `doRW11AC0201メソッドは、ユーザ情報登録画面を表示する処理。`

findings.description: `W11AC02Action` is a PascalCase class name explicitly referenced in the source section heading and body (`W11AC02Actionクラス`) but is absent from s1's hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source heading: `*W11AC02Actionクラス*\ を作成し以下のメソッドを追加する`
